issues.description: User phone and order tags are pushed to third-party platform without notice.
issues.impact: Users are unaware of external sharing of their personal data.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: send only minimum fields to third party after disclosure

issues.description: No dedicated consent is collected for third-party data sharing.
issues.impact: External sharing may proceed without lawful authorization.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: require partner_share_consent before storing profile

issues.impact: Over-collection widens privacy exposure for users.
issues.fixed_code_snippet: remove unnecessary demographic fields from points binding
